institution.name: Northern Arizona University
institution.address: 1900 S Knoles Dr, Babbitt Administrative Center, Room 200

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Northern Arizona University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($26.6k → $29.9k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northern Arizona University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
